title: juncus × obotritorum
intro: Juncus × obotritorum is a hybrid plant species of the Juncus genus, commonly known as the hybrid rushes, which is a cross between Juncus bufonius and Juncus compressus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Eastern Europe and Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Juncus × obotritorum include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help to reduce swelling and combat infections. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use by drying the roots, leaves, and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for various health applications.
